question: How many products does each gender buy?
sql: SELECT Customers.gender_code, COUNT(Order_Items.order_item_id) FROM Customers JOIN Orders ON Customers.customer_id = Orders.customer_id JOIN Order_Items ON Orders.order_id = Order_Items.order_id GROUP BY Customers.gender_code;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个性别的订单项数量

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题询问每个性别购买的产品数量，SQL反向翻译描述正确地指出了统计每个性别的订单项数量，且未涉及额外的过滤或排序条件。
